roles.title: Software Engineer & Team Captain
roles.description: Leading a team of engineers as Team Captain while continuing hands-on development with React, TypeScript, and Deno. Responsible for technical decision-making, delivery quality, and integrating AI tooling, including GitHub Copilot, LangChain, and MCP-based agent skills into the team's engineering workflows.

roles.title: Software Engineer & Agile Advocate
roles.description: Championed agile practices across the engineering organisation, facilitating retrospectives, improving workflows, and promoting a culture of continuous improvement. Contributed to feature development using React, TypeScript, and Deno, with early adoption of AI-assisted development tools.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Joined Dynatrace as a software engineer, onboarding onto a React/TypeScript/Deno stack and contributing to feature development across the platform.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Developed and maintained web hosting platform features, working across frontend and backend systems to improve customer-facing products and internal tooling.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Founding full-stack engineer at a legal tech startup. Built and shaped the core platform enabling users to manage dynamically created contracts - from employment to real estate - including KYC workflows and multi-stakeholder processes. Drove fundamental architecture decisions and mentored junior developers.

education.institution: TU Wien - Technical University of Vienna
education.degree: MSc Software Engineering and Internet Computing
